arts.sum: He returned to training this week though and has been seen taking part once more with his teammates ahead of the trip to West Ham. Chelsea wrote in an update on Wednesday that he and Lavia "continued their rehabilitation on Tuesday with another modified session as they continue their recovery from injury." The 23-year-old pulled out of France's squad during the last international break in order to continue building fitness with Chelsea after two seasons of injury issues.
